pack.icp: Solo SEO consultants managing 10-50 client pages across multiple countries.
pack.wtp: Pricing evidence shows agencies pay for rank trackers, but indexing diagnostics WTP is still weak.
pack.competitor_gap: Rank trackers show movement, but do not explain low indexing causes by country.
pack.positioning: Indexing diagnostics for SEO consultants running country-specific pages.
pack.outreach: I am testing country-specific indexing diagnostics for SEO consultants. Would feedback on your current workflow be useful? Reply stop if not relevant.
pack.landing: Grow faster with AI. Save time and get insights today.
pack.roadmap: Day 1: interview 5 consultants. Day 2: collect pricing anchors. Day 3: test indexing headline. Day 4-6: source 20 prospects. Day 7: decide.
